================================================================================
AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES IN USE
================================================================================

[QUESTIONS] Template:
  "Thanks for the question! Here are some resources to help:
   • Visit our website for detailed guides: [link]
   • Check our FAQ section for common topics
   • Feel free to ask more specific questions!"

[PRAISE] Template:
  "Thank you so much for the kind words! 🙏 We're thrilled you found 
   value in this. Your support means everything to us!"

[SALES] Template: (Manual review only, no auto-response)
  "→ Flagged for manual review due to partnership/collaboration inquiry"

[SPAM] Template: (Automatic filter, no response)
  "→ Auto-filtered: No response sent to spam content"

================================================================================
DATA LOGGING
================================================================================
Log Location:        .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
Log Format:          JSONL (one record per line)
Records Stored:      402 comment records
File Size:           ~196 KB
Retention:           Indefinite (cumulative)

Each Record Contains:
  • timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC)
  • commenter (author name)
  • text (full comment text)
  • category (questions|praise|sales|spam)
  • response_status (auto_responded|flagged_for_review|ignored_spam|etc)
  • response (auto-response text if applicable)

For Live YouTube API Access:
  1. Get credentials: https://console.cloud.google.com
  2. Save to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube_credentials.json
  3. Run: python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  4. Monitor will auto-detect credentials and switch to live mode
